title: A2A Message Envelope
description: Transport envelope for all A2A messages between ELIS Advisor, ELIS PM, and ELIS Supervisor. Local-only binding on 127.0.0.1.

in_reply_to.description: Optional — if this message is a reply, the message_id of the original.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of message creation.

message_type.description: The type of message being exchanged.

payload.description: Message payload. Content schema depends on message_type.

subject.description: Short subject line for the message.

references.description: Optional list of document or file references cited in the message.

classification.description: Content classification for routing and logging.

risk_level.description: Optional risk severity assessment, applicable to advisory_review and evidence_request types.

verdict.description: Optional verdict field, only used with advisory_review message_type.

evidence_items.description: List of evidence items referenced or requested.

diagnostic_command.description: For diagnostic_query — the read-only check being requested.

diagnostic_result.description: For diagnostic_response — the read-only result payload.

error_details.description: For error message_type — details about the error.

ttl_seconds.description: Time-to-live in seconds. Messages older than TTL may be discarded.
